name: ultipa-mcp
description: Manage Ultipa Cloud instances and run GQL graph queries, algorithms, backups, and metrics from Claude.
long_description: Model Context Protocol server for Ultipa Cloud and any self-managed Ultipa GQLDB instance. Provision and operate instances, run GQL queries and graph algorithms, manage backups and firewall rules, and view metrics and billing — all through natural language.

cloud_api_key.title: Ultipa Cloud API Key
cloud_api_key.description: Manage instances and run GQL via Ultipa Cloud. Create one at dbaas.ultipa.com → Settings → API Keys. Leave blank if you only use a direct instance below.

host.title: Direct Instance Host
host.description: host:port of a self-managed GQLDB instance. Needs Username + Password below. Leave blank if using a Cloud API key.

username.title: Direct Instance Username
username.description: Admin username for the direct instance.

password.title: Direct Instance Password
password.description: Admin password for the direct instance.

graph.title: Default Graph (optional)
graph.description: Default graph name used by data-plane tools when you don't pass one explicitly.
